profiles.label: Google Docs 建立文件
profiles.purpose: 在教師確認後建立空白文件，回傳可編輯連結；內容先在本機 Wiki／outputs 完成審閱。
profiles.first_verification: Create one clearly labelled test document only after confirmation; verify its returned link, then archive the link in outputs.md.

profiles.label: Google Slides 建立簡報
profiles.purpose: 在教師確認後建立空白簡報，回傳可編輯連結；投影片內容與版面先由本機產出物通過 QA。
profiles.first_verification: Create one clearly labelled test presentation only after confirmation; do not share or publish it.

profiles.label: Google Sheets 建立試算表
profiles.purpose: 在教師確認後建立空白試算表，回傳可編輯連結；不含學生名冊、成績或聯絡資料。
profiles.first_verification: Create a de-identified test spreadsheet only after confirmation; do not import school records.

profiles.label: Google Forms 建立表單
profiles.purpose: 在教師確認後建立空白表單，回傳編輯連結；題目、說明與回覆設定先通過本機 QA。
profiles.first_verification: Create a test form only after confirmation; do not distribute it or collect responses.

profiles.label: Apps Script 執行既有函式（進階）
profiles.purpose: 呼叫使用者既有、已部署為 API executable 的 Apps Script；其實際 scopes 由該 Script 宣告，不應猜測或預設授權。
additional_requirements: A shared standard Google Cloud project
Scopes declared by the target Apps Script
A separate explicit confirmation before every execution
profiles.first_verification: Do not run a script automatically. First inspect the deployment owner, declared scopes, function name, parameters, and expected side effects.

profiles.label: Google Classroom 課程唯讀
profiles.purpose: 僅列出使用者可檢視的課程，使用 API 回傳的 alternateLink 作為課程連結；不讀取名冊、成績或學生作業。
profiles.output_link_source: alternateLink returned by the Classroom API
profiles.first_verification: List only the current user's courses after confirmation; do not create courses, coursework, roster changes, or grade operations.
